subject: Re: Thank U
body:
I will connect with her. Thank U.

Re. The 10th....I got email that they will let me know soon.
I will let U know as soon as I know.
Just taking of to Dublin :-)
Have amazing time in Paris. :-)
Xxx
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Thu, 17 Apr 2008 17:49:43 
To:petra@happyheartsfund.org
Subject: Re: Thank U


I saw the douglass elliman guy. today. its evas apartment , and james cayne. ask eva for details, and i 'll get the other. .. did you get an anwer about may 10? I'm in paris/ 

----- Original Message ----
From: "petra@happyheartsfund.org" <petra@happyheartsfund.org>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 17, 2008 8:33:14 PM
Subject: Thank U

Dear Jeffrey,
Hope U R enjoying this amazing day! I'm sorry I have missed the fun victory of your incredible girl! 
:-)
I would so love to see her! Hopefully soon.

Thank U so much for the opportunity with the 2 Apartaments.
:-)

I would have some questions to assist in the marketing and sale of them the best way. 
  
·         Why are you selling the property? 
·         What are your plans once the property sells? 
·         What is the square footage? 
·         How many bedrooms? 
·         How many bathrooms? 
·         What unique aspects do you like about the property? 
·         What price do you hope to get? 
·         What price do you have to get? 
·         What price would you buy the property for? 
·         What are your favorite aspects about the property? 
·         What are your favorite aspects about the neighborhood? 
And many others.
How I could proceed? Who I can contact? Would they be exclusive?

Thank U so so much.
Hugs P.
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra
